name: Sour Cream Doughnuts No. 1456
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oil in the deep fryer to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
2. Beat the eggs well.
3. Slowly add the sugar, beating constantly.
4. Stir in the sour cream.
5. Sift the flour before measuring.
6. Resift the flour with the baking soda, baking powder, and salt.
7. Stir the sifted ingredients into the egg mixture until well blended.
8. Chill the dough.
9. Roll out on a lightly floured board to a 1/2 inch thickness.
10. Cut with floured doughnut cutters or biscuit cutters of different sizes.
11. Allow the dough to dry for 10 minutes on toweling.
12. Use a pancake turner dipped in hot oil to place the doughnuts into the oil.
13. Fry until golden brown (2-3 minutes per side), turning with the turner as needed.
14. Remove the finished doughnuts using tongs and dry on toweling.
15. Dust with sugar or powdered sugar, or glaze after they have cooled.
Yields 36 Doughnuts
